_comment: Terms that translators and AI drafts must keep verbatim (untranslated), and rules for ICU placeholders. Brand and feature names stay in English for consistency across locales.

placeholders.rule: Keep every {placeholder} exactly as written - they are substituted at runtime. Do not translate or reorder the token name inside the braces.
placeholders.icu: Plural/select forms use ICU MessageFormat, e.g. {count, plural, one {# warning} other {# warnings}}. Translate the inner text; keep the keywords (plural, select, one, other) and the # and {} syntax.
